old_value: {"id":"bitmap-marketplace-ssd","title":"PSBT service - listing construction","description":"Build PSBT for seller listings using rust-bitcoin. {"id":"bitmap-marketplace-jaa","title":"PSBT service - buy flow completion","description":"Complete buyer-side PSBT flow: (1) fetch seller's signed PSBT from DB, (2) verify inscription UTXO still unspent via Bitcoin RPC, (3) add buyer payment inputs + inscription output + change output, (4) calculate fee using current fee rate, (5) return to frontend for buyer signing, (6) validate complete PSBT, (7) broadcast via Bitcoin RPC.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:30Z","created_by":"alpesh","updated_at":"2026-03-05T13:21:30Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-vs2","title":"Add GET /explore/blocks endpoint for filtered block height pagination","description":"Add a new Axum route that returns paginated block heights for a given filter category. Used by the frontend explore page to support collection-based filtering with prev/next navigation.

## Endpoint
GET /explore/blocks?filter=<category>&page=0&limit=9

## Query params
- filter: string (required) — one of: punks, palindrome, sub-100k, nakamoto, patoshi, billionaire, epic-sat, pizza, pristine-punk, perfect-punk
- page: u64 (default 0)
- limit: u64 (default 9, max 50)

## Response JSON
{
  heights: [u64],      // block heights for this page
  has_more: bool,
  has_prev: bool,      // page > 0
  total: Option<u64>   // if deterministic/known count
}

## Filter logic

### Deterministic (pure computation, no DB needed)
- punks: heights where height % 4 == 3
- palindrome: heights whose decimal string is a palindrome
- sub-100k: heights 0..99_999
- nakamoto: heights 0..36_288 (approximate Satoshi-era)

### Curated (return hardcoded representative list for now, wire real data later)
- patoshi, billionaire, epic-sat, pizza, pristine-punk, perfect-punk: return stub data / curated arrays

## Files to create/modify
- src/routes/explore.rs (new) — handler + filter logic
- src/routes/mod.rs — register /explore/blocks route","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T05:52:28Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-11T05:52:28Z"}

    owner: String,
    traits: Vec<String>,
    children_count: usize,

  }

new_value: Implemented GET /bitmap/:block_height/details endpoint. Added get_bitmap_by_height query, created bitmaps route module, and integrated into router.
Implemented GET /api/bitmap/:block_height/details endpoint. Tested and verified working with curl. Returns block_height, inscription_id, owner, traits, children_count, genesis_height.

old_value: {"id":"bitmap-marketplace-zl6.2","title":"Replace flat 13-sat locking fee with dynamic calculation","description":"DEFAULT_LOCKING_TX_FEE_SATS=13 only covers single p2wpkh input at 0.1 sat/vB. The gas validation already calculates correct dynamic fee but locked_value_sats ignores it. Fix: use ceil(vbytes * relay_fee_rate).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T08:25:05Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-20T08:25:05Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-zl6.3","title":"Add marketplace fee output to buy PSBTs and remove dead royalty code","description":"Neither build_protected_sale_psbt nor build_buy_psbt adds a marketplace fee output. Fee model: max(BPS% of price, 1000 sats), buyer pays on top, sent to MARKETPLACE_FEE_ADDRESS env var. Also delete dead royalty code (royalty.rs, royalty_address/royalty_bps on listings), replace royalty_sats with marketplace_fee_sats in sales table.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T08:25:08Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-20T08:25:08Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-zl6.1","title":"Add seller pre-signature on sale template at listing time","description":"finalize_multisig_and_extract expects both seller and marketplace partial_sigs on input 0, but seller never signs the sale PSBT. Fix: generate sale template at listing time, have seller sign with SIGHASH_SINGLE|ANYONECANPAY, store partial_sig in DB, embed into sale PSBT at buy time.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T08:25:01Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-20T08:25:01Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-zl6.4","title":"Add pre-broadcast UTXO liveness check before submitpackage","description":"confirm_order and accept_offer broadcast package without checking input UTXOs are still unspent. Fix: call gettxout for locking tx inputs and buyer funding input before submitpackage, return clear error messages.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T08:25:12Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-20T08:25:12Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-iwo","title":"Migrate 2-of-2 multisig from P2WSH to Taproot script-path (P2TR)","description":"Align bitmap-marketplace with mempool-protection reference by replacing P2WSH CHECKMULTISIG with Taproot script-path using CHECKSIG+CHECKSIGADD. Excludes marketplace fee logic (already diverged intentionally). Covers: multisig script construction, address generation, signing (ECDSA→Schnorr), finalization (witness→tapScriptSig+controlBlock), sale template, and all tests.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T08:57:01Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-20T08:57:01Z"}

new_value: Taproot script-path migration complete. Fixed compilation error (added Hash trait import), updated tests for Taproot: 1) protected_sale_psbt_populates_multisig_and_buyer_metadata now validates tap_scripts, 2) finalize_multisig_and_extract_finalizes_buyer_input_too now uses Schnorr signatures with SIGHASH_SINGLE|ANYONECANPAY for seller and SIGHASH_ALL for marketplace. All 56 tests pass.

old_value: {"id":"bitmap-marketplace-ip7","title":"CRITICAL: Sale template output mismatch invalidates seller pre-signature","description":"build_sale_template_psbt (psbt.rs:732-735) uses placeholder output[0] = {locked_value, empty_script} but the final sale tx in build_protected_sale_psbt has output[0] = {price_sats, seller_address}. Since SIGHASH_SINGLE|ANYONECANPAY commits to output[0], the sighash differs and the seller pre-signature is invalid. Fix: thread seller_address and price_sats through LockingPsbtRequest -\u003e build_locking_psbt -\u003e build_sale_template_psbt so the template uses the real committed output.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T18:09:50Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-03-20T18:09:50Z"}

new_value: Fixed: threaded seller_address and price_sats through LockingPsbtRequest -> build_locking_psbt -> build_sale_template_psbt so the sale template output[0] matches the final sale tx. Added test coverage.

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-ao2.5","title":"Implement auth routes (src/routes/auth.rs)","description":"POST /api/auth/connect: accepts {paymentAddress, ordinalsAddress}. If profile exists for ordinals_address, return JWT+profile. If no JWT header, create new profile. If JWT header present, link wallet to existing profile. DELETE /api/auth/wallets/:address: remove linked wallet (requires JWT, cannot remove last). GET /api/auth/profile: return profile+wallets (requires JWT). Add jwt_secret to AppState, mount at /api/auth.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-04-01T13:04:03Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-04-01T13:04:03Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-ao2.6","title":"Add POST /api/portfolio/multi endpoint","description":"New endpoint accepting { addresses: Vec\u003cString\u003e, page, limit, trait_filter }. Validates 1-10 addresses. Parallel ord_client.get_address_inscription_ids() via futures::join_all. Builds inscription_id-\u003eowner mapping. Merges inscription IDs, uses existing DB methods. Adds owner: Option\u003cString\u003e to PortfolioBitmapItem. Returns MultiPortfolioResponse.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-04-01T13:04:07Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-04-01T13:04:07Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-8u3","title":"Add wallet ownership verification via message signing","description":"SECURITY: Currently POST /api/auth/connect accepts any address without proof of ownership. Anyone who knows an ordinals address can create a profile for it. Fix: After getAccounts, call Wallet.request('signMessage', { message: 'Link wallet to Bitmap Portfolio:\u003ctimestamp\u003e', address }) on frontend. Backend verifies the signature using the bitcoin crate before creating/linking the profile. This is the highest priority security fix before production.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"vashalpesh@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-04-01T14:49:00Z","created_by":"twosatsmaxi","updated_at":"2026-04-01T14:49:00Z"}
